description: URL is a 301 redirect to /events/biotech-japan-2018/ - needs a redirect rule in the EDS redirects spreadsheet, not a content page

URL redirects to /pharma-services-boston-workshop-april-2026/ which is a landing page for a Boston workshop event. Not a pharma-services service hub. Needs EDS redirect rule from /pharma-services/ to /pharma-services-boston-workshop-april-2026/. Landing page content has been staged at content-staging/pharma-services-boston-workshop-april-2026.html.
